data.title: Major winter storm may disrupt travel plans with ice, sleet, and substantial snow expected in the eastern U.S. from Friday.
data.description: Severe winter weather including ice, sleet, and potential heavy snowfall is expected to disrupt air travel across the eastern United States beginning this Friday. Travelers should be prepared for possible delays and cancellations as a result of these weather conditions.

data.title: Visa partners with Mercuryo to offer crypto-to-fiat conversion for eligible users via Visa Direct, expanding global payment reach.
data.description: On Thursday, Visa Inc. (NYSE: V) announced a partnership with the global payments platform Mercuryo to provide fast and smooth crypto-to-fiat off-ramps via Visa Direct. This collaboration enables Mercuryo's eligible users to convert digital assets into fiat currency on their Visa debit or credit cards quickly and cost-effectively. Visa Direct facilitates swift money transfers across brokerage, crypto, and digital banking accounts, enhancing the accessibility of secure, real-time payments worldwide.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana facing risks as Bitcoin's recovery stalls after resistance rejection, attributed to political rhetoric about Greenland.
data.description: Bitcoin's recovery attempt has been halted after hitting a crucial weekly resistance level, raising the possibility of further decline. Analyst DonAlt highlighted the shifting market dynamics towards headline-driven scenarios over technically-driven setups, following geopolitical uncertainty related to recent Trump administration comments on Greenland. Bitcoin is currently in a volatile state, with higher-timeframe structures still intact but momentum disrupted by external news. DonAlt linked the recent dip to political factors. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stock market surges with Dow up 500 points, Gold above $4,900; Corning gains. Positive GDP data, Nvidia and Tesla rise.
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced a notable increase following unexpected GDP data. During morning trading, Nvidia and Tesla showed strong gains. The stock market today saw a significant rise of 500 points in the Dow, while the price of gold exceeded $4,900. Corning also saw an increase in its stock price.

data.title: Tesla, BYD, and other EV makers experience chip shortage as Elon Musk designs own chips amidst semiconductor prioritization for data centers.
data.description: Major electric vehicle manufacturers such as Tesla and BYD are encountering a shortage of chips, as semiconductor companies are giving preference to data center clients. Reports indicate that Tesla and BYD are grappling with a chip shortage; however, Elon Musk has responded by creating his own chips.

data.title: Small-cap stocks outperforming S&P 500 in 2026, while major stocks struggle. Magnificent Seven down this year.
data.description: 2026 has shown a strong performance for small-cap stocks, surpassing the slow-moving S&P 500. However, the Magnificent Seven have experienced a decline since the beginning of the year. This contrast in performance reflects the dynamic nature of the current market trends, with small-cap stocks showing notable resilience and growth. The post highlights how these smaller companies are outperforming larger, well-known ones.

data.title: Europe remains on edge as President Trump reverses course on Greenland, leaving World Economic Forum leaders wary.
data.description: Andrew Ross Sorkin, an editor at large of DealBook, discussed the apprehension felt by leaders at the World Economic Forum in Davos following President Trump's recent decision to step back from using tariffs or military intervention to acquire Greenland. This move has significantly alleviated tension among attendees, as they were concerned about the possible repercussions of such actions. It is reported that discussions at the forum are revolving around the implications of this decision, with the general sentiment being one of relief. The change in approach by President Trump has been a point of discussion among the participants, with many expressing their views on the matter.

data.title: Tesla removed safety monitors from some Austin robotaxis, stock rising. CEO Elon Musk confirmed on Thursday.
data.description: Elon Musk, the CEO of Tesla, announced that the electric vehicle company has dismantled certain safety monitors in its robotaxis in Austin, Texas. This decision was disclosed on Thursday and consequently led to a surge in Tesla's stock value.

data.title: Teledyne Technologies receives an upgrade in its Relative Strength Rating due to improving price performance.
data.description: Teledyne Technologies has seen a positive trend in its price performance, resulting in an upgrade to its IBD Relative Strength Rating. This upgrade signifies the company's strong growth in comparison to other stocks. This development showcases the company's potential for further success in the market.

data.title: Alkermes stock earns technical upgrade, showing rising price performance.
data.description: Alkermes has demonstrated an increase in price performance, resulting in an upgrade to its IBD Relative Strength Rating. The stock of Alkermes has shown positive technical indicators, leading to an upgrade in its rating. This development showcases the company's strong performance in the market.

data.title: Future announced acquisition of SheerLuxe, UK-based digital publishing group combining trusted media brand with creator economy.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, in London, Future declared the acquisition of SheerLuxe, a rapidly expanding digital publishing company located in the UK. This move solidifies Future's position as a top player in specialist media. SheerLuxe brings together the credibility of a well-established media brand with the genuine connection and involvement found in the creator economy. This strategic acquisition marks a significant step for both companies in the industry.

data.title: Tambourine unveils Tambourine One, a unified solution for hotel websites & booking engine. announced on Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on January 22, 2026, Tambourine introduced Tambourine One, a comprehensive new solution merging their hotel website technology and booking engine. This global leader in hotel marketing technology aims to assist hotels with a single, powerful platform.

data.title: Inventor from Sitka, Alaska creates ergonomic shovel with HANSONS UTILITY HANDLE for easier manipulation.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, an inventor from Sitka, Alaska, discussed the development of a new shovel with an improved handle for easier manipulation. The inventor introduced the HANSONS UTILITY HANDLE, aiming to enhance balance and leverage. This innovation could potentially assist in alleviating common issues faced with traditional shovels.

data.title: CEO: USDC is a neutral layer, not competing with Visa or Mastercard. Jeremy Allaire at Davos mentions Circle's stablecoin.
data.description: During an event in Davos, Jeremy Allaire discussed Circle's stablecoin, highlighting its role as shared infrastructure instead of posing as a threat to traditional banks or card networks.
